info.name: text-delete
info.text: Ideas will grow in the garden of your mind.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Ideas will develope into tasty fruit with the right ingredients.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Ideas need to be nurtured in order to grow into something that can reap the rewards of a plentiful harvest.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Ideas need to grow in the best of conditions to thrive.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Ideas need warmth and sustenance in order to become fruitful.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Ideas need to be cultivated in order for them to provide an abundance of rewards.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Ideas will provide what you need to survive.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Ideas get bigger with time and loving care.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Walk carefully around ideas, for they can wither and die if stepped on.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Under the right conditions, ideas will grow into satisfying fruits.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Ideas are the spice of life.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: An idea can sustain your life.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: The best gardener has many ideas to keep the plants happy.
